title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
